title: ClientOptimizer
description: As the name it self says Client Optimizer is trying to optimize the client in many ways, that it may not look like vanilla Minecraft anymore, but are vanilla
body:
--------------------------------

ClientOptimizer modpack aims to make the gameplay a lot better by giving YOU the power to optimize YOUR gameplay how you like and want, but at the same time keep it vanilla like. It is also there to make building a litle bit eazier, because it adds a lot of Mods like [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) and [Armor Statues](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-statues/versions).

Every version of ClientOptimizer has it's own unique features, so you can choose what mod-pack you like the most.

--------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Warnings & known bugs</summary>
  
  - Before starting you might need to change your keybinds
  - In the version 3.0.0 your game might chrash by opening your inventory (Happend to me like 5 times But it is sooo random that I don't even know if it's a bug or a server problem)
  - In the version 3.0.0, when you download it it will say 4.0.0 Idk why but yeah :/


</details>
